overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk along an elevated pedestrian walkway in a futuristic cyberpunk city. The player passes neon-lit storefronts, digital billboards, and pedestrians before entering an NCART transit station. The scene features high-rise megabuildings with glowing signage and a dark, neon-drenched atmosphere.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along an elevated walkway with a metal railing on the right, overlooking the city skyline

notable_agents.action: walking in the opposite direction along the walkway

entered.detail: metal safety railing running along the right side of the elevated walkway
large illuminated sign reading MEGABUILDING H7 SANTO DOMINGO on the building facade
tall futuristic skyscrapers with glowing windows and neon signage including Kiroshi tower
tall modern street lamps illuminating the walkway with bright white light
illuminated vendor carts visible on the street level below the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated concrete walkway at night, with a metal railing on the right overlooking the distant cyberpunk city skyline. The MEGABUILDING H7 sign is visible on the left, while tall street lamps illuminate the path. Sparse pedestrians walk in the opposite direction as the camera moves forward steadily.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial strip with digital advertisements

events.description: passing from open skyline view into a more enclosed commercial section with large digital billboards
camera briefly looks down over the railing to view food carts on the street below

agents.ego_description: walking past commercial storefronts and digital billboards, observing the neon-lit environment and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: sitting on a concrete bench next to a large digital billboard

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement showing a man holding a drink with REAL WATER text
glowing arcade game cabinets lined up outside a storefront
digital advertisement with a grinning face and SWEET CLEAN SPEED text
illuminated billboard showing a clown-like figure with ALL FOODS text

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow commercial corridor lined with neon storefronts and massive digital billboards displaying advertisements. The MEGABUILDING H7 sign remains visible on the left but recedes into the distance. Pedestrians sit on benches and walk along the path, while arcade machines glow near shop entrances. The camera briefly looks down at food carts on the street level before continuing forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit station entrance with glass doors

events.description: approaching the NCART transit station entrance with glowing green glass doors
entering the NCART station through the automatic glass doors

agents.ego_description: walking toward and entering the NCART transit station, approaching the fare gates

entered.detail: transit station entrance with MEGABUILDING H7 signage and NCART NIGHT CITY AREA RAPID TRANSIT text
automatic glass doors with green neon framing and NCART logo etched on the glass

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the NCART transit station entrance marked by glowing green neon and glass doors. The digital billboards and storefronts fall behind as the camera moves toward the station. The MEGABUILDING H7 sign becomes prominent again on the left. The player enters through the automatic glass doors into the transit station, transitioning from the outdoor walkway to an indoor environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along an elevated urban walkway that transitions from an open city vista into a dense commercial corridor and finally into a transit hub. It begins on a concrete path under tall street lamps, moving past a metal railing that overlooks a distant cyberpunk skyline while the MEGABUILDING H7 sign looms on the left. As the camera advances, the open air gives way to a narrow corridor crowded with glowing arcade machines, neon storefronts, and massive digital billboards, with a brief glance down toward food carts on the street level below. The scene then shifts away from the commercial bustle as the camera approaches the NCART transit station, marked by glowing green neon and glass doors. Finally, the camera passes through the automatic doors, leaving the outdoor neon atmosphere behind to enter the indoor environment of the station.
